description: Connection check, per-table row stats, and the last 5 rows from a selected public table (heuristic order by first column).

options.content: The stub table `public.biobase_ingest_sample` (from `initdb` + app startup) gives Grafana a real row to show until real ingest tables exist. **Last 5 rows:** first column **DESC**; edit the panel SQL for your own time column.

panels.description: One row if the connection works. If this is empty, check bb_postgres is up, bb_client network, and Biobase Postgres credentials.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT current_database() AS database,
       current_user     AS grafana_user,
       now()            AS server_time_utc

panels.title: Postgres connection

panels.description: n_live_tup is approximate; use it as a quick “is there data?” signal, not for precise counts. Table must be analyzed for best accuracy.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.schemaname,
       s.relname     AS table_name,
       s.n_live_tup AS approx_live_rows,
       s.n_tup_ins  AS total_inserts,
       s.n_tup_upd  AS total_updates
FROM   pg_stat_user_tables s
ORDER  BY s.n_live_tup DESC NULLS LAST, s.relname

panels.title: Public schema tables (approx. live row counts from stats)

panels.description: Requires a selected **public_table**. Heuristic: ORDER BY first column DESC. Empty dropdown = no public base tables yet. If this errors, add ORDER BY <your_time_column> DESC in the panel query.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM public.${public_table:raw} ORDER BY 1 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

panels.title: Last 5 rows (ingestion / selected public table)

list.definition: SELECT tablename AS __value, tablename AS __text FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY 1
list.label: public_table
list.name: public_table
list.query: SELECT tablename AS __value, tablename AS __text FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY 1

title: BioBase Data Ingestion
